overall.description: A first-person perspective journey on the NCART metro system in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning on a station platform, traveling through the neon-lit Night City skyline, stopping at Glen North station, and continuing through dark underground tunnels. The footage showcases the game's cyberpunk aesthetic with vibrant holographic advertisements and futuristic architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking along the platform toward the train entrance while observing the station environment

notable_agents.action: waiting for the train near the platform edge

entered.detail: illuminated cyan NCART sign indicating the metro system
orange and brown seating arranged along the platform
fluorescent tube lights mounted on the station ceiling

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on the NCART metro platform at night, with the cyan station sign glowing overhead. Several pedestrians stand scattered across the concrete platform waiting for the train, while fluorescent lights illuminate the semi-covered station. The camera moves forward toward the train entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metro train traversing Night City

events.description: player enters the train and the view transitions to the moving train perspective
onboard announcement indicates the next stop is Glen North

agents.ego_description: riding the elevated train and observing the Night City skyline through the windows

entered.detail: tall futuristic towers with illuminated windows and glass facades
large glowing advertisements and digital displays on building faces
cyan and magenta neon lights decorating the urban architecture

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to the train interior as it accelerates along elevated tracks, revealing the sprawling Night City skyline. Towering skyscrapers with holographic billboards and vibrant neon signage pass by the windows while the train moves steadily through the urban canyon.

events.description: train arrives at Glen North station and onboard announcement plays
train departs Glen North station and accelerates into the tunnel

agents.ego_description: observing the Glen North station platform and signage while the train stops briefly

notable_agents.action: standing on the Glen North platform near the station entrance

entered.detail: large bright red neon sign reading GLEN NORTH mounted on metal framework
concrete platform with yellow safety markings and glass barriers

segments.scene_description: The train arrives at Glen North station, where a prominent red neon sign illuminates the platform. A few pedestrians are visible on the platform as the train slows to a stop, then accelerates away from the station back into the transit system.

events.description: train enters dark tunnel system leaving Glen North station

agents.ego_description: traveling through dark tunnels with occasional views of structural beams and distant city lights through windows

entered.detail: metal support beams and girders lining the tunnel ceiling
dark concrete walls with occasional illuminated windows showing building interiors

segments.scene_description: The train enters a dark tunnel system, leaving the open city behind. The view shows metal structural beams and concrete walls rushing past the windows, with occasional glimpses of lit building interiors through small windows in the tunnel walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that begins on a glowing metro platform and transitions from the vibrant neon skyline of Night City into the oppressive darkness of an underground tunnel. It begins on the NCART platform under cyan signage and fluorescent lights, moving forward as the perspective shifts into the train interior. As the train accelerates along elevated tracks, the view opens up to a sprawling urban canyon filled with towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards. The scene then slows as the train pulls into Glen North station, momentarily illuminated by a prominent red neon sign, before accelerating away and plunging into a dark tunnel system. Finally, the open city vanishes, replaced by rushing metal beams and concrete walls with occasional glimpses of lit interiors flickering past the windows.
